name: clay-workbench
description: The complete Clay.com workbook + workflow plugin for Claude Code. Hybrid router skill with 19 sub-skills covering the full Clay workflow — hygiene (pre-Clay list cleaning, ongoing CRM data hygiene), source + build (TAM sourcing from Clay's native dataset, Clay Workflow construction with node-level Global Rules, ABM lists, account research, prospect research, multi-provider enrichment waterfalls), score (ICP fit + composite buying-signal intent), activate (outbound copy + Sending Gate + sequencer push, real-time inbound routing with programmatic webhook creation, recurring trigger monitoring), quality + cost (Claygent prompt iteration, credit forecasting + provider comparison, portfolio-wide cost audit, single-workbook troubleshooting, record-level table debugging), and persistence (save/load/version reusable workbook templates). Tier-1-first execution via the official Clay Agent Plugin (clay CLI + workflow MCP tools), claude.ai connector fallback, manual UI walkthrough last. Mandatory credit pre-flight, ICP-gates-before-credits enforcement, client-voice detection.
